proportion of reef substrate suitable for depeloyment, currently set to 0.5 in cost model (It's set to 0.5 because generally about half of a site we're running transects on will be reasonable to deploy corals to (not too deep, made of unstable sand, already covered in coral, or similar).
seasonal window in days; if large # of devices, more than one ship and more equipment on each ship; shorter deployment period means more ships --> more equipment
